jd_text:
Job Purpose

 Identify growth opportunities and technological solutions across core Asset Management systems, data platforms, and digital operations Develop tech, digital and data strategy / road map and ensure its implementation within FAB Asset Management Act as change agent in FAB Asset Management’s digital ambitions, proactively advising leadership on relevant trends Develop IT and Data policies and procedures

Key Accountabilities

 Deep knowledge of IT systems, data platforms and enterprise architecture required to run an asset management firm (e.g., PMS) as well as the most advanced technical solutions (e.g., asset pooling) and application (e.g., tokenization) Deep knowledge of all digital tools and advanced analytics relevant to an asset manager (client reporting, data management systems…) Expertise in leveraging and implementing tech to improve operations Develop, operationalize and optimize FAB AM technology and data infrastructure Deliver on business KPIs and tech/digital/data adoption targets Collaborate with internal stakeholders (e.g., business lines) to align strategies and initiatives Remain up to date with regulatory standards and framework that will ultimately deliver an outstanding customer experience

Qualifications & Experience

 Business digital & tech partners Enterprise analytics & AI Digital platform operations Data governance & quality Asset Management Systems (e.g., Portfolio Management System) Asset Pooling Tokenization Years of experience: 5+ years
